title: Conquest Reforged Modpack (Fabric)
description: The official Conquest Reforged modpack, for Fabric!
body:
[![conquestheader](https://i.imgur.com/zcirlvD.png)](https://conquestreforged.com) [![discordimg](https://img.shields.io/discord/164052674637987840?color=1b1b1b&label=Discord&logo=Discord&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/ZagrZvn)[![twitterlink](https://img.shields.io/twitter/follow/conreforged?color=1b1b1b&label=Follow%20@ConReforged&logo=twitter&style=for-the-badge)](https://twitter.com/ConReforged)[![weblinkimg](https://img.shields.io/badge/Website-ConquestReforged.com-1b1b1b?style=for-the-badge)](https://conquestreforged.com) ### THIS PAGE IS FOR THE FABRIC MODPACK ### FORGE USERS SHOULD USE THE FOLLOWING LINK: [FORGE MODPACK](https://modrinth.com/modpack/conquest-reforged-modpack-(forge)) ### +8064MB of RAM (assigned to Minecraft) recommended for maximum stability!

What is the Conquest Reforged mod pack?

Conquest Reforged itself is an aesthetic Minecraft mod and spiritual successor to the [Conquest_](https://conquestreforged.com/conquest-pack) resource-pack which was developed for players who wish to enhance their creative Minecraft experience and push their builds far beyond the limitations of the base game. The modpack packages Conquest Reforged up and includes all necessary mods for the best aesthetic experience with the best performance mods for increased accessibility and framerates.

What does the Conquest Reforged mod pack have to offer?

* Thousands of handmade 32x semi-realistic textures with elaborate connected textures * Over 12k blocks with more being added regularly * Enhanced foliage with layer placement functionality and "Better Grass" * Custom skybox and atmosphere include invisible lighting, particle effects, and animated wildlife * A growing [online](https://conquestreforged.com/serverslist/servers) community of creative builders and breathtaking group projects ‍

Full Continuity Compatibility and Enhanced Visuals

With Continuity, we take all of our blocks to the next level in their looks. Connected textures are pivotal to the Conquest Reforged experience. Optifine is **no longer** required for the best experience! ‍

Handcrafted Textures for all Your Building Needs

Expanding on the beautiful 32x textures from Monsterfish's [Conquest_](https://conquestreforged.com/conquest-pack) resourcepack, the Conquest Reforged mod encompasses a wide range of thematic assets which can be utilized in any project from Roman colonies, medieval villages, and even modern industrial facilities. With the addition of [ArdaCraft's](https://ardacraft.me/) Lord of the Rings themed textures this also includes Hobbit, Dwarven, and Elven assets which are perfect for any fantasy themed map.
